name: Le Maitre Neutron XS Hazer with Roadcase
notes: The Neutron XS Hazer (manufacturer sku #2999A) utilises Le Maitre's world patented S.T.A.R (Sequentially Tracked Automatic Re-Issue) technology to produce consistently pure haze with no oil, no water, no residue and no noise.  This compact unit can deliver up to 150 hours of haze from just one 2.5 litre bottle of fluid. Combine this with its minimal power consumption and built in self cleaning mechanism, and you have a top of the range hazer that is low cost as well as low maintenance.
